message:
The other day, I was rummaging through some old boxes and came across our family’s fire escape plan from years ago. It made me chuckle — crayon drawings and all! It reminded me of those low-tech family meetings we used to have, practicing our escape routes while pretending we were in a superhero movie. 😄

It hit me that we could all use a little more of that fun today. With everything being so high-tech, sometimes it’s nice to bring it back to basics. We’ve since updated our plans and even added a few new fire safety tips, but rediscovering that playful approach made it all feel a bit lighter. 

Have you ever revisited a childhood safety plan or activity with your family? What fun twists have you added to make it more engaging?
